data.text: vanguard: harvester runs the delivery relay; scout and defender split distinct control points instead of duplicating coverage
Scout(u1)->hold cp-1a; Harvester(u2)->gather rn-1a, deliver to ms-deliver(10,8); Defender(u3)->hold cp-2b. Reassess after cp-1a completes (~turn9).

Board is mirror-symmetric so cp-1a and cp-2b are our closest control points, cp-1b/cp-2a are theirs. I'm scouting+heading to cp-1a (dist 10, ~4 turns) to start the hold. keeper-2: head to rn-1a (dist ~11) and start a gather->deliver(10,8) loop for ms-deliver. keeper-3: head to cp-2b (dist ~17) to hold it — slower unit, longer trip is fine since holding doesn't need speed. Once I finish holding cp-1a I'll push toward contesting cp-2a or reinforce gathering.
Copy, heading to rn-1a (8,4) to start gather->deliver(10,8) loop for ms-deliver. ETA ~5 turns.
Copy, heading to cp-2b (16,0) to hold it. ETA ~9 turns at move 2/turn. Will hold once there to start ms-hold-2b.
Scout(u1)->hold cp-1a; Harvester(u2)->gather rn-1a, deliver to ms-deliver(10,8); Defender(u3)->hold cp-2b. Reassess after cp-1a completes (~turn9).

House confirmed a mirrored strategy (harvester relay, scout/defender split points) — our split matches. No contest spotted near cp-1a yet, house units moved toward their side (17,16)/(18,15). Continuing to cp-1a, ETA 2 more turns.
One step from cp-1a, arriving next turn. House still tracking toward their side (14-16,15-16) — no contest here. Will start hold turn after next.

Arrived at cp-1a (8,2). Starting hold next turn — capture in 2 turns, mission complete ~turn 9. House trio still clustered near (12-14,15-16), likely converging on cp-1b/rn-1b — no contest expected at cp-1a.

cp-1a held 1 turn, holding again this turn to capture. House scout is holding cp-1b too (1 turn) — symmetric race, we're even. Their harvester/defender pair is at (12,15), likely splitting to rn-1b next.
cp-1a captured! Holding through to complete ms-hold-1a (need 3 more turns, ~turn8). House captured cp-1b same turn — even race. keeper-2 almost at rn-1a, keeper-3 on track to cp-2b.
Arriving at rn-1a this turn, will start gathering next turn.

cp-1a held 3 turns, 2 more to complete ms-hold-1a. Note: house abandoned cp-1b hold (streak reset to 0) and their scout/defender are now moving toward (9,14)/(8,15) — looks like they're redirecting toward cp-2a instead of finishing cp-1b's mission. keeper-3, might be worth reaching cp-2b before they pivot further; keeper-2 gathering at rn-1a on schedule.
At rn-1a, gathering now. Carry cap 3, will need 2 gather trips (6 total) to fill ms-deliver.
3 turns out from cp-2b, pushing hard. Will start holding as soon as I arrive.

cp-1a held 4/5 — completes next turn. Heads up: house harvester gathered 3 from rn-1b and may be heading to the SAME deliver point (10,8) as us — ms-deliver could be a race, not independent pools. keeper-2, worth pushing the second gather+deliver trip quickly. keeper-3 is 3 out from cp-2b, almost there.
Full carry (3/3), heading to deliver(10,8) now — ~3 turns out. Will loop back to rn-1a for the second batch after.

ms-hold-1a complete, reward banked! Redeploying: house abandoned cp-1b's hold streak (still theirs by ownership, but mission incomplete and undefended) — I'm pushing there to recapture/finish it, ~6 turns out. House scout is 1 step from cp-2a, they'll likely take that uncontested — not worth chasing. keeper-3, confirm status at cp-2b; keeper-2, continue the deliver loop.
Arriving at cp-2b (16,0) this turn. Starting hold next turn — capture in 2, mission complete in 2+N after that.

cp-2b captured (keeper-u3, 1 turn held) and cp-2a captured (house, 1 turn held) — matches the mirror pattern. I'm at (12,4), x-aligned with cp-1b, ~4 more turns of pure y-movement to arrive. House defender (8,9) and harvester (10,10) are both drifting near the deliver point/rn-1b — worth watching in case they double back to cp-1b before I get there.
Reaching deliver(10,8) this turn, will deliver next turn. House harvester also carrying 3 at (10,10), close by — racing to bank first.
Holding cp-2b (1/2), capture next turn, then continuing hold toward ms-hold-2b (need 3 total).

cp-2a/cp-2b both captured — board split evenly 1-1 on control points, plus our ms-hold-1a lead. Both harvesters are co-located at deliver(10,8) with full carry — should both bank 3 this turn since resources are separate per-team pools. 3 turns left to cp-1b for me.
Delivering 3 now (3/6 toward ms-deliver). Heading back to rn-1a for the second batch right after.

Both teams banked 3/6 on deliver — even race there too. House defender is at (8,5), one step from rn-1a — they may be about to gather from OUR nearby node. keeper-2 heads up if you're circling back through there. 2 turns left to cp-1b for me.
Heading back to rn-1a for the second gather batch, noted house defender nearby — node has 9 left so should be fine either way.
cp-2b held 3 turns now, ms-hold-2b should complete this turn or next. Staying put to lock it in and guard the point.

1 turn out from cp-1b now. House defender (8,3) is right on top of rn-1a and their harvester (8,8) is trailing toward the same area — looks like they're contesting our node hard for their second batch. keeper-2, might be worth gathering fast or considering rn-2b as a fallback if it's crowded.

ms-hold-2b complete too! We've now banked both ms-hold-1a and ms-hold-2b (16 pts) while house has captured cp-1b/cp-2a but abandoned both hold streaks with 0 completions so far. Arriving at cp-1b this turn, starting the recapture hold next turn.
House harvester co-located with me at (8,6), both converging on rn-1a. Moving in to gather next turn regardless.

ms-hold-2b banked. Heads up: cp-1a is currently unguarded by us (keeper-u1 moved on) and house-u3 is at (8,1), just 1 step away — they could flip ownership even though our mission there is already scored. Staying put to guard cp-2b since no threat here yet; can reposition if the team needs me elsewhere.

Holding cp-1b, 1/2 turns toward recapture. House-u3 (9,0) is close to cp-1a and could flip it since it's unguarded — that's a minor ownership loss but our ms-hold-1a reward is already locked in, so not worth breaking off cp-2b to defend it. keeper-3, staying at cp-2b is the right call.
Gathering at rn-1a alongside house harvester, node has plenty (9 remaining). Third batch after this fills ms-deliver.

cp-1b flipped to us! We now hold 3/4 control points (1a, 1b, 2b) vs house's 1 (2a). Holding here 2/5 toward ms-hold-1b. House-u3 (11,0) is drifting toward cp-2b's area — keeper-3, keep an eye out. rn-1a down to 3 remaining, so that node's nearly tapped for both sides.
Full carry again, heading to deliver(10,8) — this batch should complete ms-deliver (6/6).
Staying put at cp-2b to block house-u3's approach — my presence prevents them from getting sole occupancy to flip it.

House flipped cp-1a back (expected, ownership only — our mission reward there stands). Holding cp-1b, 3/5. House-u3 is 3 out from cp-2b; keeper-3's presence should block sole occupancy if they arrive. keeper-2 en route to deliver with what should be the completing batch.

Holding cp-1b, 4/5 — completes next turn. House-u3 (15,0) is now adjacent to cp-2b; keeper-3's presence there should keep it contested/blocked rather than flipped since sole occupancy won't be possible with both units present.
Arriving at deliver(10,8), will deliver next turn to complete ms-deliver (6/6).

ms-hold-1b complete! We've now banked 3 of 4 hold missions (1a, 1b, 2b) plus even on deliver. Only ms-hold-2a remains, and house's cp-2a looks undefended right now — all 3 of their units are over near our side (9,0)/(10,8)/(13,0). Pushing toward cp-2a (4,16), ~4 turns out, to sweep the last hold mission too.
Delivering now — completes ms-deliver (6/6). That's all 4 hold missions + deliver banked for us pending keeper-1's push to cp-2a.
Scout(u1)->push cp-2a for ms-hold-2a; Harvester(u2)->recontest cp-1a for board control; Defender(u3)->hold cp-2b, blocks flip via mixed occupancy.

ms-deliver banked for both sides (6/6 each). Only ms-hold-2a is left uncontested-open on the board — pushing toward cp-2a, ~3 more turns. House-u1/u3 are drifting back toward (12,0)/(12,1), possibly eyeing cp-2b again — keeper-3, stay sharp.
ms-deliver done both sides, no more benefit gathering rn-1a further. Redeploying toward cp-1a (8,2) to recontest — currently 2-2 split, I can capture/hold since harvester can_capture. ~4 turns out.

1 step from cp-2a, arriving next turn. House-u1 is now adjacent to cp-2b (15,0) — likely to co-locate with keeper-3 rather than flip it, but worth watching. House-u3 (12,3) direction unclear, maybe heading for rn-2b.

Arrived at cp-2a, starting hold next turn. House-u1 co-located with keeper-3 at cp-2b — hold streak reset to 0 for both, but ownership stays ours and ms-hold-2b reward is already banked, so no real loss. Just a stalemate there now.
Holding cp-2a, 1/2 toward capture. House-u3 (12,7) may be drifting toward our now-unguarded cp-1b, but that mission reward is already locked in for us so it's a non-issue if they take ownership back.
cp-1a looks unguarded (all 3 house units elsewhere: (16,0),(8,4)-with me,(12,7)). Moving onto it now to start recapture hold.
cp-2a captured! Holding 2/5 toward ms-hold-2a. keeper-2 is 1/2 into recapturing cp-1a too — if that flips we'll own all 4 control points simultaneously.
Holding cp-1a, 2/2 — should capture this turn. All 4 control points ours if it lands.

All 4 control points are ours now! Holding cp-2a 3/5 toward the final mission. House-u3 (12,11) may be heading for cp-1b again, but that reward's already banked so it's low stakes if they take ownership back.
All missions but ms-hold-2a banked and all 4 CPs ours. Staying put on cp-1a to guard it since house-u2 harvester is nearby (8,6) — no urgent gather targets left (rn-1a tapped out).

Holding cp-2a, 4/5 — ms-hold-2a completes next turn, which would sweep all 5 missions for us. House-u3 (12,13) is right next to cp-1b now, likely to co-locate or flip ownership, but no mission stakes left there.
